{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = King of Dreams
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] addressed someone as the [[King of Dreams]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“You seek to violate my mind, King of Dreams?<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
